name: Church Announcement (OpenClaw Church)
tagline: Create church announcements in one-liner, SMS, and full formats.
description: Generates church announcements in three lengths for a given occasion, time, and place: one-liner (headline/verbal), SMS (short text), and full announcement (bulletin/email). Formal, clear tone; suitable for mass distribution. No devotional content unless the user adds it. For church staff and communicators. Related: Bible QA, Sermon Outline, Pastoral Prayer skills by OpenClaw Church.
